name: ETRI AI
description: ETRIs open Korean AI API hub — ExoBrain NLP, speech recognition, OCR and translation endpoints for research and industry.

seo.title: ETRI AI — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: ETRI AI: ETRIs open Korean AI API hub — ExoBrain NLP, speech recognition, OCR and translation endpoints for research and industry.

when_to_use: Accessing ETRI's Korean NLP models and speech APIs
Building Korean voice recognition features in enterprise apps
Using government-backed AI APIs for Korean language processing
Running Korean NER and sentiment analysis at research scale

pros: Free Korean NLP, STT, OCR endpoints
Backed by Korea's ETRI research institute
Useful for research and academic projects
review.verdict: Great research sandbox for Korean language AI; not a production provider.
review.best_for: Korean academic and research teams prototyping NLP and speech apps
review.not_for: Production Korean apps — Naver Clova or Kakao fit better

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Unknown pricing, no explicit peak-lock evidence
